mapper.select: SELECT d.*, u.display_name AS author_name, (SELECT bi.image_url FROM blog_image_drafts bi WHERE bi.draft_id = d.draft_id AND bi.is_thumbnail = true AND bi.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1) AS thumbnail_url FROM blog_post_drafts d JOIN users u ON d.author_id = u.user_id WHERE d.is_deleted = false AND d.status = #{cond.status} AND d.category = #{cond.category} AND d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cond.keyword}, '%') AND d.author_id = #{cond.authorId} AND d.updated_at >= #{cond.startDate}::timestamp AND d.updated_at <= #{cond.endDate}::timestamp ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{cond.limit} OFFSET #{cond.offset}
SELECT d.*, u.display_name AS author_name FROM blog_post_drafts d JOIN users u ON d.author_id = u.user_id WHERE d.draft_id = #{draftId} AND d.is_deleted = false

SELECT d.*, u.display_name AS author_name, au.display_name AS approved_by_name, ru.display_name AS rejected_by_name FROM blog_post_drafts d JOIN users u ON d.author_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN users au ON d.approved_by = au.user_id LEFT JOIN users ru ON d.rejected_by = ru.user_id WHERE d.draft_id = #{draftId} AND d.is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_post_drafts ( author_id, title, content, category, status, submitted_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{status}, #{submittedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_post_drafts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, approved_by = #{approvedById}, rejected_at = #{rejectedAt}, rejected_by = #{rejectedById}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, published_post_id = #{publishedPostId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE draft_id = #{draftId} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE blog_post_drafts SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE draft_id = #{draftId}
